title: michelia macrocarpa
intro: Michelia macrocarpa, also known as the Golden Cup or Yellow Jessamine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a chemical called magnoflorine, a natural antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory compound. The health benefits of Michelia macrocarpa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
